title: Help with a simple Zappier integration to Edit a status

posts.author: stephdejersey (Stephane Gimenez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please help me…
I am trying to do what seems to be a very simple integration from DevOps to Monday.com, via Zappier, but I cannot for the life of me select the ItemID.
In my Monday.com, I store the DevOps ID, in column “numbers”
so in the integration “Update Item Status Column Value in monday.com”
I am trying to set the ItemID = 'numbers" but I can’t.

The integration works fine if I hard set the itemID to a record in my board, but I need to set the DevOps ID = “numbers”…
How please?

I am uploading a little screen shot of what I am trying to achieve…
test in ItemID is the hardcoded value of the item, but this is where I need to say = DevOps resourceID

Screenshot 2021-03-13 at 15.36.04946×637 34.7 KB
